name: Lomekwi: Resource-Bounded Tool Discovery in LLM Agents

description: arXiv:2607.16961v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Existing tool-use benchmarks report a single success rate for complex, multistep tasks. Inspired by ideas from cognitive science, we distinguish tool use from tool discovery and decompose the latter into curiosity (the model's ability to discover the parts needed to build the tool), recognition (the model's ability to discover the process of creat...
author: Roshan Klein-Seetharaman, Daniel Wang, Andrew Xu
